risk_title: Security Situation Threatening Project Implementation Timeline
risk_summary: Project completion of Karantina sorting facility rehabilitation is contingent on security conditions remaining stable. Deterioration in security could delay or prevent project delivery by May 2025 deadline.
evidence_quote: the project has initiated works for the rehabilitation of Karantina sorting facility, which will be completed by May 2025, if the security situation allows it.

risk_title: Local Governance Obstruction of Project Activities
risk_summary: Local authorities (Beirut Governorate and Municipality) have withheld necessary approvals for planned waste management interventions, blocking implementation of drop-off centers and alternative waste management measures despite completed feasibility studies.
evidence_quote: the centers/points could not obtain necessary approvals from Beirut Governorate and Municipality. The project team could not identify another feasible modality for providing a grant scheme for promoting sorting at source

risk_title: Political/Administrative Deadlock on Contaminated Waste Management
risk_summary: Coordination with Ministry of Environment on asbestos-contaminated rubble management at Bakalian site remains unresolved despite completed assessments. Local stakeholders rejected proposed sites citing competing land use priorities, blocking urgent contamination remediation.
evidence_quote: Recommendations for both these activities which were submitted to local stakeholders were not approved as the proposed sites are public land and the implementation of such interventions will affect the potential for the use of these lands.
